hero.title: Industries We Transform
hero.subtitle: Engineering specialized solutions for global industries
hero.desc: We don't just build software; we build industry-specific competitive advantages. From highly regulated healthcare systems to high-frequency fintech platforms.

industries.name: FinTech & Banking
industries.desc: Secure, scalable, and compliant financial systems. We build core banking engines, payment gateways, and AI-driven fraud detection.

industries.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences
industries.desc: Empowering providers with HIPAA-compliant patient portals, EHR integrations, and AI diagnostic assistants.

industries.name: E-Commerce & Retail
industries.desc: High-performance storefronts and headless commerce architectures that drive massive conversion and scale.

industries.name: Logistics & Supply Chain
industries.desc: Optimizing global trade with real-time tracking, warehouse automation, and predictive route optimization.

industries.name: EdTech & Learning
industries.desc: Interactive LMS platforms, virtual classrooms, and AI tutors that personalize the learning journey.

industries.name: Real Estate & PropTech
industries.desc: Modernizing property management, virtual tours, and automated valuation models for the modern market.

industries.name: Media & Entertainment
industries.desc: Transforming how audiences consume content with scalable streaming platforms, personalized recommendation engines, and high-engagement digital experiences.

industries.name: Travel & Tourism
industries.desc: Elevating the modern travel experience through AI-driven itineraries, seamless booking integrations, and dynamic pricing engines.

industries.name: Manufacturing & Industrial
industries.desc: IoT data aggregation, production line tracking, and enterprise-wide ERP synchronization for factories where downtime is measured in lakhs per hour and data integrity is non-negotiable.

industries.name: Food & Restaurant
industries.desc: Order management, POS integrations, and delivery workflow automation for restaurants and food businesses that need every order tracked from kitchen to customer.

cta.title: Have an industry-specific challenge?
cta.desc: Our team of domain experts is ready to engineer your solution.
